scope.packet_label: ThirdPerson human inputs on 2026-04-19 local time

excerpts: Use this repo as a standalone Unreal Engine sandbox for validating third-person gameplay baselines outside the engine source tree.
prefer durable runtime instrumentation over one-off editor guesses when debugging live PIE behavior
treat repo-root REGRESSION.md as canonical for task-level regression claims in this repo
Regression in this repo uses the human default lane.
Operator lanes such as command-line overrides, alternate maps, proof views, or other non-default harnesses do not substitute for regression proof of the human default experience.
TP-REG-003: The possessed pawn is visible and controllable.
regression test means running the real Unreal project in PIE and observing the gameplay surface
do not label headless diagnostics as regression by itself
use this lane for real gameplay proof

notes: There is no HUMAN-DESIRE.md available for ThirdPerson in the provided local context.
Use AGENTS.md, REGRESSION.md, and TESTING.md as hard local constraints when they materially affect need selection.
